name: shansofts
description: Shansofts — IT & Software Solutions company website (MERN + Tailwind CSS)

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix server
scripts.dev: concurrently -n client,server -c blue,green "npm run dev --prefix client" "npm run dev --prefix server"
scripts.vercel-build: npm install --prefix client && npm run build --prefix client
